text:
Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo 4.0.0 update out now, patch notes

A new version 4.0.0 update for Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo is now available. One of the highlights is a new “Random Selection from Favorites” feature. Also, Nintendo says it changed the method for selecting alarm scenes. The full notice about the update is as follows: Nintendo Sound Clock: Alarmo 4.0.0 update out now, patch notes We’ve changed the method for...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Street Fighter 6 announces Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade modes

Two new modes are on the way to Street Fighter 6 – specifically Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade. Both are coming to the game on May 28, 2026. With Random Avatar Matches, players can experience “quick and fair online Avatar Battles”. Avatar Arcade provides “efficient avatar growth”. Here’s some additional information, courtesy of Capcom: Random Avatar Matches Random Avatar...

The post Street Fighter 6 announces Random Avatar Matches and Avatar Arcade modes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales releases “Prologue Demo”, new trailer

Ahead of its launch next month, a brand new “Prologue Demo” has just come out for The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales.  The demo lets players try out the HD-2D action RPG for themselves. Save data can be carried over to the full game. Here’s some additional information about the demo: Carry your save data over to the full...

The post The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales releases “Prologue Demo”, new trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo reveals new mobile game Pictonico

Nintendo is releasing a brand new mobile game titled Pictonico, the company just revealed. It will be available on May 28, 2026. Pictonico is a mini-game experience centered around using photos. You can use your own face (or friends as well) across 80 different challenges. It’s already drawing comparisons to Face Raiders on Nintendo 3DS. The game is free to...

The post Nintendo reveals new mobile game Pictonico appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Unreal Engine 5.8 gets new Lumen mode to improve performance on handhelds, should benefit Nintendo Switch 2

Unreal Engine 5 recently released a new preview for its version 5.8 update which could bring about benefits for Nintendo Switch 2 games. The company is prioritizing performance advancements, which has become continually important over the past few months. As part of this, a new Lumen mode has been revealed that targets 60 FPS on all gaming systems, including handhelds....

text:

Since its reveal, The Adventures of Elliot: Millennium Tales, which launches for Nintendo Switch 2 on June 17, has often been compared to the Legend of Zelda series, especially the top-down entries, largely due to similarities in its gameplay style. text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book developer finally revealed

Just a couple of days before the launch of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, we finally have confirmation about the developer behind the game. This may not come as much of a surprise, but it was indeed Good-Feel who developed the project. Good-Feel being the developer of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is something that fans had already speculated on....

text:

Nintendo is offering up another look at Yoshi and the Mysterious Book today, and we now have a look at the game’s opening. text:
Kabuto Park, a cozy bug collecting adventure game, heading to Nintendo Switch

Today, Doot and Seaven Studio shared the news that Kabuto Park is getting a new version for Nintendo Switch. The game is planned for May 28, 2026. Kabuto Park is a cozy bug collecting adventure game. On Nintendo Switch, players can take advantage of the Joy-Con gyroscope by waving the controller like an insect catching net to collect bugs. Learn...

text:
Kusan: City of Wolves gets Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer

Thanks to PQube and CIRCLEfromDOT, we now have the release date for Kusan: City of Wolves. It’ll be out on July 30, 2026 both physically and digitally. Kusan: City of Wolves, which features a hyper-violent neon-noir underworld where every fight is a brutal performance and every bullet counts, back in 2024. text:

Thanks to Skystone Games and Mi’pu’mi Games, the launch trailer is in for Black Jacket. text:
Suda51 and Swery’s Hotel Barcelona coming to Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

­Hotel Barcelona is making the jump to Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, Eden Industries and White Owls revealed today. Launch timing will be shared soon. Hotel Barcelona is a 2.5D action horror roguelite coming from Suda51 and Swery. When it hits Nintendo platforms, the game will come with the base game, the Under New Management overhaul, the Late Check-Out DLC,...

text:
Rumor: Nintendo Direct happening by mid-June

According to Giant Bomb’s Jeff Grubb, a Nintendo Direct will air by the middle of June. In other words, if true, a presentation should be expected sometime within the next few weeks. Grubb shared that tidbit of information during the latest Giant Bombcast episode. He doesn’t currently have an answer as to whether it would be a Partner Showcase or...

text:
Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition gets TressFX update on Nintendo Switch 2

Aspyr lived up to its promise to update the Nintendo Switch 2 version of Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition, as a patch has just been released which adds TressFX.
